---
id: preview-dataset-url
title: "Preview content from a URL"
description: "Fetches a partial content preview from an arbitrary HTTP/HTTPS URL, without creating a dataset. Intended for the dataset form preview after URL validation."
sidebar_label: "Preview content from a URL"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Preview content from a URL"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/preview-url"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches a partial content preview from an arbitrary HTTP/HTTPS URL, without creating a dataset. Intended for the dataset form preview after URL validation.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
